price_vs_cat_median: Ratio of listing asking price to its category median. >1 = premium priced, <1 = discount priced.
price_vs_cond_median: Ratio of asking price to the median for same category+condition. Captures pricing relative to comparable peers.
price_per_year: Asking price divided by equipment age. Higher = higher per-year retained value.
log_asking_price: Natural log of asking_price + 1. Used to normalize skewed price distribution.
price_zscore_cat: Z-score of asking price within its category. Captures how far a listing deviates from category average.
age_bucket: Equipment age bucketed into lifecycle stages.
is_vintage: Binary: 1 if equipment is 20+ years old (potential vintage/classic value).
listing_age_days: Number of days since the listing was posted (relative to most recent listing in dataset).
hours_per_year: Average hours used per year of equipment life. High = heavy use, Low = light use.
hours_vs_cat_median: Ratio of hours used to category median. >1 = higher utilization than peers.
log_hours_used: Log-transformed hours used. Normalizes right-skewed distribution.
total_engagement: Weighted sum of views (×1), bids (×3), inquiries (×2). Captures listing demand intensity.
bid_rate: Ratio of bids to views. High value = strong buyer interest per exposure.
inquiry_rate: Ratio of inquiries to views. Captures serious buyer intent.
engagement_zscore: Z-score of total_engagement across all listings. Identifies high/low demand listings.
seller_listing_count: Number of listings this seller has in the dataset. Proxy for seller activity level.
seller_avg_price: Average asking price across all of this seller's listings. Captures seller market tier.
seller_sold_rate: Fraction of this seller's listings that sold. Proxy for seller effectiveness.
is_high_vol_seller: Binary: 1 if seller is in top 25% by listing volume (power seller).
seller_verified_flag: Binary: 1 if seller is verified on the platform.
category_freq: Proportion of all listings that belong to this category. Captures category-level supply.
region_demand_proxy: Mean total engagement for all listings in this region. Higher = more active market region.
region_freq: Proportion of all listings in this region. Captures regional supply concentration.
condition_score: Ordinal encoding of condition: Poor=0, Fair=1, Good=2, Excellent=3.
condition_price_interaction: Product of condition_score and price_vs_cat_median. Captures premium pricing given condition.
seller_listing_velocity: Number of listings this seller posted in the same quarter. High = high-frequency seller.
category_velocity: Number of listings in same category and quarter. Captures seasonal/cyclical supply surges.
price_label: Price intelligence classification: underpriced/fair_priced/overpriced relative to category+condition peers.
category_enc: Label-encoded version of 'category' for model input.
make_enc: Label-encoded version of 'make' for model input.
region_enc: Label-encoded version of 'region' for model input.
condition_enc: Label-encoded version of 'condition' for model input.
seller_seller_type_enc: Label-encoded version of 'seller_seller_type' for model input.
